summary: Verified via HTTP only against http://127.0.0.1:7088: `/` serves the review-queue HTML with `./styles.css` and the expected Google Fonts css2 URL, `/styles.css` contains the GARRISON palette and badge colors while excluding the old dark-theme colors, and `/api/queue` still returns valid JSON.
steps: exec_command: checked repo context (`CLAUDE.md`, presence of `.codegraph`, and searched for `PRD.md`/`PLANING.md`/`TASKS.md`)
exec_command: used `codegraph explore "review queue fitting UI styles.css main.js queue endpoint"` to orient on the improver UI/backend wiring
exec_command: `curl -iS http://127.0.0.1:7088/main.js` to confirm the app still calls `/api/queue`
exec_command: ran a Node fetch check against `/` to assert the `./styles.css` link, Google Fonts css2 URL, title, and `./main.js` script tag

exec_command: ran a Node fetch check against `/styles.css` to assert `--paper: #fbf8f1`, `--ink: #18211c`, `--brass: #b4862a`, `--sage: #2f4a3a`, absence of `#0f1115`, `#5b8cff`, `#161a22`, and badge colors `.badge.pending { color: #7d5410 }` and `.badge.auto { color: #755c14 }`
exec_command: ran a Node fetch+JSON.parse check against `/api/queue` to confirm HTTP 200 and valid JSON with `queue` as an array
